city_market_intro.label: City Market Intro
city_market_intro.description: 170–200 word standalone text block on PM certification demand in the target city. References local industries, employers, salary.

hero_subtext.label: Hero Subtext (Inject)
hero_subtext.description: Injects 2–3 sentences into the next hero_split hs_subtext field. City-specific, mentions live-virtual delivery.
hero_subtext.ai_prompt:
You are writing hero subtext for {business}, a PMI Premier Authorized Training Partner, for a {service} page targeting {city}, {SS}.

City context:
- Key industries: {industries}
- Major employers: {top_employers}

Write 2–3 sentences of hero subtext (40–60 words total):
- Open with a city-specific statement referencing a dominant local industry or major employer and why this certification matters there
- Mention live-virtual instructor-led training or PMI authorization in sentence 2
- Close with a value statement: career advancement, salary impact, or pass rate

Rules: Professional tone. No bullets. No exclamation marks. Not sales-y.

Return JSON only:
{"text": "2-3 sentences here"}

feature_columns_local.label: Feature Columns — Local (Standalone)
feature_columns_local.description: 4-column feature_columns block: 3 product benefits + 1 city-specific column referencing local industries or employers.
feature_columns_local.ai_prompt:
You are writing feature columns for {business}, a PMI Premier Authorized Training Partner, for a {service} page targeting {city}, {SS}.

City context:
- Key industries: {industries}
- Major employers: {top_employers}

Write exactly 4 feature columns:
- Columns 1–3: Core product benefits. Choose 3 from: live instructor-led training, PMI Premier ATP authorization, high pass rate, experienced instructors, flexible live-virtual scheduling, small class sizes, comprehensive exam prep
- Column 4: A city-specific benefit. Why this certification is especially valuable for professionals in {city}. Reference the dominant local industry or a major employer by name.

Each column:
- heading: 3–5 words, benefit-focused
- text: 20–30 words, concrete and specific

Return JSON only:
{"columns": [{"heading": "...", "text": "..."}, {"heading": "...", "text": "..."}, {"heading": "...", "text": "..."}, {"heading": "...", "text": "..."}]}

faq_additions.label: FAQ Additions (Inject)
faq_additions.description: Appends 2 city-specific FAQ items to the next faq_two_col block's fq_items array.
